name: Sadness Of Valor
short_description: Build, manage, fight in a post apocalyptic RTS game
detailed_description:
What is this?

Sadness of Valor is a real-time strategy game (RTS). Building on the foundations of the genre, it draws heavily from the greatest titles to create a story-driven game without forgetting the customized battles that make this game category well-known to everyone.

Story

As a commander aboard the Global Support Orbital Station (GSOS-3), capable of rapidly intervening on parts of the planet, you ensure the survival of humanity.
However, nothing goes as planned.
Face the chaotic desert left by the planet and uncover the mysteries of the story.

Your objectives

Build your base, establish your defenses or attacks, manage your base and its resources to achieve the best performance.

Possibilities

Take part in humanitarian aid in the campaign.
Compete against AI or your friends in custom matches.
Play as a fully controllable tank in an asymmetric custom game.

Features

This game bases its gameplay on managing and positioning units during combat. Resources are scarce, forcing the player to find the best efficiency to reach the objective and win. Unit shots can be avoided, and friendly fire is possible and dangerous.

Fight

An RTS is a game where you need to plan as much as possible. Take the time to understand the advantages of each game mechanic, units, buildings, and upgrades.


Fight friends or AI on board of a tank in a FPS view in the Asymmetric mode from custom games.


Upgrade your army with skins and personalisations earned by matchmaking vs AI

Features

  • An RTS game: Real-Time Strategy
  • Shots are not deterministic and can miss their target.
  • A multitude of upgrades are available to perfect your army
  • Custom games to play with friends or against AI
  • Asymmetric games in custom matches for different gameplay experiences
  • Skins and personalisation of units
  • Matchmaking VS AI

Who am I?

Sadness of Valor was developed by a single person: Slordef, a passionate game developer who has been creating in all forms since childhood, particularly stories and music.
The idea of telling a story, of bringing it to life, is something important, and what better way to do it than through a video game.
Find in the game credits all the information about the work accomplished, software used, 3D, graphics, music, and everything that makes up the game created by Slordef.

English*, French
